rationale.R1.2: The section constructs a causal chain (temperature=0 → assumed determinism → observed variability → GPU/CUDA attribution → reproducibility implication); logical validity of each link warrants checking.
rationale.R1.3: Concrete quantitative claims are asserted (AUROC delta ≤0.07 for Galactica-1.3B, RMSE delta ≤0.31 for Llama-3-8B) without reference to a table or figure; alignment between these point figures and underlying experimental evidence must be confirmed.
